events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen's legendary guitarist Brian May celebrates his 79th birthday today.

angles.name: Guitar God
angles.copy: Happy 79th birthday to the iconic Brian May! His guitar work with Queen is simply out of this world.

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The Rolling Stones frontman, Mick Jagger, celebrates his 83rd birthday.

angles.name: Rock 'n' Roll Longevity
angles.copy: Eighty-three years young and still commanding the stage! Happy birthday to the legendary Mick Jagger. What's your favourite Stones track?

events.title: MTV launched 45 years ago
events.blurb: Music Television (MTV) launched on August 1, 1981, with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' as its very first music video.

angles.name: Video Killed The Radio Star
angles.copy: Forty-five years ago today, MTV burst onto screens, playing 'Video Killed The Radio Star' first. The irony isn't lost on us, is it?

events.title: Oasis released 'Definitely Maybe'
events.blurb: Oasis released their seminal debut album 'Definitely Maybe' on August 29, 1994.

angles.name: Britpop Icon
angles.copy: Twenty-two years since Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe'. What an album, what a moment for Britpop. Which track still gets you going?

events.title: Woodstock Festival began 57 years ago
events.blurb: The iconic Woodstock Music & Art Fair, a three-day festival of peace and music, began on August 15, 1969.

angles.name: Peace & Music
angles.copy: Fifty-seven years since the original Woodstock Festival kicked off. A legendary moment in music history, bringing together half a million for peace and music.

events.title: Anniversary of Elvis Presley's passing
events.blurb: Elvis Presley, 'The King of Rock & Roll', passed away on August 16, 1977, at the age of 42.

angles.name: Remembering The King
angles.copy: On this day, we remember the one and only Elvis Presley, who left us 49 years ago. His music and legacy continue to inspire.

events.title: Anniversary of Tupac Shakur's passing
events.blurb: Influential rapper Tupac Shakur died on September 13, 1996, six days after being shot in Las Vegas.

angles.name: Tupac's Legacy
angles.copy: Remembering Tupac Shakur, who tragically passed away on this day in 1996. His impact on music and culture remains profound.

events.title: Anniversary of Jimi Hendrix's passing
events.blurb: Legendary guitarist Jimi Hendrix passed away on September 18, 1970, at the age of 27.

angles.name: Guitar Legend
angles.copy: On this day in 1970, we lost the incomparable Jimi Hendrix. His innovative guitar work changed music forever.

events.title: The Beatles released 'Abbey Road'
events.blurb: The Beatles released their iconic album 'Abbey Road' in the UK on September 26, 1969.

angles.name: Iconic Album Cover
angles.copy: The Beatles' 'Abbey Road' was released 57 years ago today! That album cover, those songs... pure genius.

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: The Pretenders' frontwoman, Chrissie Hynde, celebrates her 75th birthday today.

angles.name: Pretenders Icon
angles.copy: Happy 75th birthday to the brilliant Chrissie Hynde! Her distinctive voice and songwriting have given us so many Pretenders classics.

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: Oasis and Beady Eye frontman, Liam Gallagher, celebrates his 54th birthday.

angles.name: Rock 'n' Roll Star
angles.copy: Our kid turns 54 today! Happy birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher. What's your favourite Liam moment?

events.title: John Lennon released 'Imagine' single
events.blurb: John Lennon's iconic single 'Imagine' was released in the US on October 11, 1971.

angles.name: Timeless Message
angles.copy: Fifty-five years ago, John Lennon gave us 'Imagine'. A song with a message that resonates just as strongly today.

events.title: Apple announced the first iPod
events.blurb: Apple unveiled the first-generation iPod on October 23, 2001, promising '1,000 songs in your pocket'.

angles.name: Pocket Full of Tunes
angles.copy: Remember this? Twenty-five years ago, Apple introduced the first iPod. It completely changed how we listen to music.

events.title: James Bond Day
events.blurb: October 5th is celebrated as James Bond Day, marking the premiere of the first Bond film, 'Dr. No', on this day in 1962.

angles.name: Shaken, Not Stirred
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! Sixty-four years since 'Dr. No' hit cinemas. Who's your favourite Bond and what's the best theme tune?

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: Today would have marked the 86th birthday of The Beatles co-founder and peace activist, John Lennon.

angles.name: Remembering John
angles.copy: On what would have been his 86th birthday, we remember the extraordinary John Lennon. His music and message live on.

events.title: John Cleese turns 87
events.blurb: The iconic British actor, comedian, and writer John Cleese celebrates his 87th birthday.

angles.name: Comedy Legend
angles.copy: Happy 87th birthday to the brilliant John Cleese! From Monty Python to Fawlty Towers, a true comedic genius.
